name: Guardragon Garmides
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>護</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ご</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ガルミデス
desc: If a Normal Monster(s) is sent to your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can send 1 Dragon monster from your hand to the GY; add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Guardragon Garmides" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a Normal Monster(s) is sent to your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can send 1 Dragon monster from your hand to the GY; add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Guardragon Garmides" once per turn.
eff: If a Normal Monster(s) is sent to your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can send 1 Dragon monster from your hand to the GY; add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Guardragon Garmides" once per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
